benefit1.description: Claim VIP 2x EXP daily from Welfare Official in Tianjicheng; gain 2x monster EXP for 1 hour.

benefit2.description: Claim Bronze VIP Daily Gift Pack from Welfare Official in Tianjicheng.

benefit3.description: When reaching Level 40/50, claim Level 40/50 weapon rewards at Welfare Official in Tianjicheng.

benefit5.description: Grants player 50 Physical ATK, 50 Magic ATK, 50 Dao ATK.

benefit6.description: Gain extra draws in VIP Lottery.

benefit7.description: Become Bronze VIP to immediately obtain Angel Wings.

benefit8.description: Can list 15 items simultaneously in the Auction House.

benefit1.description: Claim VIP 4x EXP daily from Welfare Official in Tianjicheng; gain 4x monster EXP for 1 hour.

benefit10.description: Can list 20 items simultaneously in the Auction House.

benefit2.description: Claim Gold VIP Daily Gift Pack from Welfare Official in Tianjicheng.

benefit3.description: When reaching Level 40/50/60, claim weapon rewards at Welfare Official in Tianjicheng.

benefit4.description: Can enter all Instances 1 extra time daily.

benefit5.description: Can enter the Demon Tower 1 extra time daily.

benefit7.description: Grants player 100 Physical ATK, 100 Magic ATK, 100 Dao ATK.

benefit8.description: Gain extra draws in VIP Lottery.

benefit9.description: Become Gold VIP to immediately obtain Angel Wings.
